case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.briefing: Investors are waiting for a plan. Arrange development stages by time.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.ALPHA.title: Alpha
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.IDEA.hint: Formulation of the problem and solution.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.IDEA.title: An idea
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.MVP.hint: Minimum working version of the product.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.01.message: You can't do MVP before ideas.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.02.message: You cannot test Alpha before MVP.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.03.message: You can't show Beta before Alpha.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.04.message: You cannot release a release before Beta.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.feedback.CAUSALITY_: Raw product should not be given to people before internal inspection.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: You are trying to approve a stage that is not prepared.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.briefing: The team wants to “get into the public eye” faster. Make sure the order is logical.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.PROBLEM.hint: First, understand what we are solving.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.PROBLEM.title: Problem
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.dep.01.message: You can't build a prototype without a problem.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.dep.02.message: MVP is not born out of thin air.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: The causality of the stages is broken.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.briefing: Security system. Arrange the stages of preparation for release.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.LOGGING.title: Logging in
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.PENTEST.title: Pentest
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.THREAT.hint: Determine what we are protecting ourselves from.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.THREAT.title: Threat model
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.01.message: Logs without understanding the threats are useless.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.02.message: Pentest without logs is worse than diagnostics.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.03.message: Beta cannot be released before security checks.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.feedback.CAUSALITY_: The public stage comes before verification.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: A step is missed or is out of place.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.briefing: Investor cycle. Arrange the steps so that it doesn't look like a fairy tale.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.FUNDING.title: Financing
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.HIRE.title: Eight
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.MEETING.title: Meeting
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.PITCH.title: Pitch
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.dep.01.message: First the pitch, then the meeting.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.dep.04.message: MVP is made by people, not air.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.briefing: Legal cleanliness before public launch. Arrange the stages.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.PRIVACY.title: Confidentiality
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.TERMS.title: Conditions
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.dep.01.message: First the product, then the documents.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.feedback.CAUSALITY_: It cannot be released to the public without basic legal framework.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: The order of the documents is out of order.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.briefing: Quality control. Correct order saves you from shame.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.ALPHA.title: Alpha
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.QA.title: QA
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.feedback.CAUSALITY_: The public stage comes before quality control.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.briefing: Restore the history of secure access to the server. Error in order = security hole.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.AUTHN.hint: Authentication: proving that I am me.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.AUTHZ.hint: Authorization: the system decides whether I can come here.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.IDENT.hint: Identification: I declare who I am.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.LOG.hint: Recording a successful login. Traces always remain.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.LOG.title: Creating a session and logging it
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.01.message: You cannot authenticate an unknown user: identification (login) first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.02.message: You cannot check permissions before proving identity: authentication first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.03.message: A log of a successful login is possible only after checking rights (authorization).
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.CAUSAL: Causality is broken: first prove your identity, then prove your rights.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.LOGIC_: You have skipped a stage. The system does not accept magic instead of procedure.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.OK: Access is completed correctly: identification → authentication → authorization → log.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.ORDER_: Almost. Check that the steps are strictly in sequence.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.briefing: Repeat the secure login timeline, but with a different identity verification factor.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.AUTHZ.hint: Authorization: the system decides whether I can come here.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.IDENT.hint: Identification: I declare who I am.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.LOG.hint: Recording a successful login. Traces always remain.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.LOG.title: Creating a session and logging it
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.01.message: You cannot authenticate an unknown user: identification (login) first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.02.message: You cannot check permissions before proving identity: authentication first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.03.message: A log of a successful login is possible only after checking rights (authorization).
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.CAUSAL: Causality is broken: first prove your identity, then prove your rights.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.LOGIC_: You have skipped a stage. The system does not accept magic instead of procedure.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.OK: Access is completed correctly: identification → authentication → authorization → log.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.ORDER_: Almost. Check that the steps are strictly in sequence.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.briefing: The text is hidden by a style conflict. Determine the final color.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.briefing: Two classes are arguing. Who is stronger decides the order.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.feedback.OK: Correct: equal weight decides the order.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.feedback.ORDER_TIE: Weight equal (10 and 10), wins the rule below in the file (order=2).
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.briefing: It is !important. Don't pretend it doesn't exist.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.feedback.IMPORTANT_: !important overrides the normal rule, even if the selector is weaker.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.feedback.OK: That's right: importance is stronger than weight.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.briefing: Inline style on an element. It's not for beauty.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.feedback.OK: That's right: inline style is stronger.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.briefing: The combined selector is stronger than the single class.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.briefing: Two ID rules with !important. Wins later.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.feedback.ORDER_TIE: Importance and weight are equal, order decides (later = stronger).
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.RED.label: Red
decryptor.ab.target.title: TARGET
decryptor.ab.hint.unavailable: Diagnostics unavailable. Run a check first.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_active: Shield is active. Wait for recharge.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_freq: Frequency shield triggered: too many checks.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_lazy: Lazy search detected. Change input in larger steps.
decryptor.c.hint.match_targets: Match targets on the left and top.
decryptor.c.hint.limit_reached: Hint limit reached for this stage.
city_map.common.result.err_incomplete: Reach the target node before submit.
city_map.common.result.err_calc: Entered sum does not match selected route.
city_map.common.result.err_not_opt: Route is valid but not optimal.
city_map.common.result.err_path_invalid: Route is invalid for directed edges.
city_map.a.briefing.title: ROUTE AUDIT
city_map.a.briefing.text: Reach node E through directed roads. Enter final path sum and submit. Only the minimal route is accepted.
city_map.a.briefing.footer: Directed graph: only outgoing roads from current node are available.
city_map.b.briefing.title: TRANSIT CHECK
city_map.b.briefing.text: Reach node E, enter exact route sum, and prove optimality in a directed graph.
city_map.b.briefing.footer: Two-way roads are active only where reverse edge exists in data.
city_map.b.result.err_missing_transit: Constraint not met: visit required transit nodes.
city_map.b.result.err_cycle: A cycle has been detected in the route.
city_map.b.status.success: Route accepted. Constraint and optimality are confirmed.
city_map.c.briefing.title: CURFEW WINDOW
city_map.c.briefing.text: Reach node L under dynamic patrol windows. CLOSED edges are blocked; DANGER edges have increased cost.
city_map.c.briefing.footer: Real timer is in the header. Sim-time changes only after successful movement.
city_map.c.result.err_missing_transit: Constraint not met: visit required transit nodes.
city_map.c.result.err_ambush: A blacklist node has been visited.
city_map.c.result.err_calc: Entered sum does not match simulated path cost.
city_map.c.schedule.title: SCHEDULE
city_map.c.status.xor_violation: XOR VIOLATION: at most one node allowed in the group
city_map.c.status.success: Route accepted. Dynamic constraints are respected.
